description_long: A male security guard is depicted wearing a dark, formal uniform consisting of a buttoned-up shirt, matching trousers, and a brown belt. He has a peaked cap with a short brim, and his shoes are dark and sturdy, suitable for long hours of standing or patrolling. The shirt is long-sleeved and appears to be made of a durable, slightly matte fabric, with no visible insignia or patches. His hands are open and relaxed at his sides, and he wears no visible tie or accessories. The overall appearance is professional and standardized, with a focus on practicality and authority. The guard's face is partially obscured by the cap, and there are no visible items of equipment or security tools attached to his uniform.
description: A male security guard in a dark, formal uniform with a peaked cap, buttoned shirt, and brown belt, standing in a professional posture. The attire is simple, practical, and lacks visible insignia or equipment.
description_view_0: Front view shows the guard's face partially covered by a peaked cap, buttoned shirt, brown belt, and open hands at his sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the cap, the straight cut of the shirt and trousers, and the relaxed arm position.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the cap, shirt, and trousers, with the brown belt clearly visible and no insignia or equipment on the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the uniform and the guard's neutral stance.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard wears a formal, dark-colored uniform consisting of a long-sleeved button-up shirt, matching trousers, a brown belt, and a dark peaked cap. The uniform is standardized, lacks a tie, and is made from a matte, durable fabric with no visible variation or decorative elements. Shoes are dark and practical, and the overall appearance is neat and professional.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms relaxed and slightly extended at the sides, projecting a neutral and attentive demeanor.
